auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Trent API key sent with the Authorization header. Get OpenClaw access and create your key from Trent's OpenClaw setup flow: https://trent.ai/openclaw/

actions.name: send_chat
actions.description: Send one message to Trent's chat endpoint and return the assembled response content plus thread metadata.

message.description: The chat message or audit prompt to send to Trent.

context.description: Optional context string sent with the message.

thread_id.description: Optional Trent thread ID for continuing an existing conversation.

client_type.description: The client type identifier sent to Trent.

client_version.description: The client version string sent to Trent.

client_info.description: Client metadata sent to Trent for attribution and troubleshooting.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending one message to the Trent chat endpoint.

content.description: The complete response content assembled from Trent response chunks.

anyOf.description: The Trent thread ID returned by the endpoint.
Advisory API-key expiration warning returned by Trent response headers.

items.description: One parsed Trent response event payload.

raw.description: Raw event payloads received from Trent while assembling the response.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Trent chat response returned by the connector.
